name: Fresh Strawberry Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 9 Inch baked pie crust (do not use graham crackers)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix sugar, cornstarch, and cold water together in a small saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over medium heat and cook until thickened.
3. Add Jell-O and stir well.
4. Place sliced berries in the pie crust.
5. Pour the Jell-O mixture over the berries.
6. Chill for several hours.
7. Top with Cool Whip or whipped cream.
Variations I have tried...
fresh peaches with peach Jello
fresh blueberries with black cherry Jello
fresh raspberries with raspberry Jello
